name: HAS_M_INOUTLINES
validation_code: @SQL=select 'Y' from dual where exists (select 1 from m_inoutline where m_inout_id = @M_INOUT_ID@)

name: DOCBASETYPE
validation_code:
@SQL=select max(dt.docbasetype) from m_inout io join c_doctype dt on (io.c_doctype_id = dt.c_doctype_id)
where io.m_inout_id = @m_inout_id@

name: HASSECONDUOM
validation_code: @SQL=SELECT (CASE COUNT(*) WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS TOTAL FROM M_PRODUCT_UOM WHERE M_PRODUCT_ID=@M_Product_ID@ AND ISACTIVE='Y'

name: OnHandLocatorDefault
validation_code: @SQL=SELECT M_LOCATOR_ID FROM M_LOCATOR WHERE ISACTIVE='Y' AND M_WAREHOUSE_ID = (SELECT M_WAREHOUSE_ID FROM M_INOUT WHERE M_INOUT_ID = @M_INOUT_ID@) ORDER BY M_LOCATOR.ISDEFAULT DESC

name: Parent_AD_Org
DOCBASETYPE
validation_code:
@SQL=select max(dt.docbasetype) from m_inoutline_acctdimension iolacct 
                           join m_inoutline iol on (iolacct.m_inoutline_id=iol.m_inoutline_id)
                           join m_inout io on (iol.m_inout_id=io.m_inout_id)
                           join c_doctype dt on (io.c_doctype_id = dt.c_doctype_id)
                           where io.m_inout_id = @m_inout_id@
